TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Piwansyawan, title = Piwansyawan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Piwansyawan} }

S.FORM: O kaacangan no Taywan koni Piwansyawan hananay a romi'ad, marecaday to Pisyongacan, Cing-ming(Pipoyfongan), Twan^o(Pipak-cangan), Cong-yin , ato Cong-ciw a romi'ad, saheto o tadamaanay a romi'ad no misaTaywanay, misaNgayngayay ato misaHolamay. O Piwansyawan a romi'ad i, itiraay i saka safaw lima a romi'ad no saka cecay a folad no mihecahecaan(o katelangay a koyomi ko pinengnengan). Minengneng to masamaamaanay, makapahay a nisanga'an a malikatay a tingkitingki i Piwansyawan, ato mitatamatama to montay a misalama .
S.PHON: o~u kaa师a艐an no~u tajwan ko~uni piwansjawan 魔ananaj a ro~umi省a涩~僧, mar蓹师a涩~僧aj to~u pisjo~u艐a师an, 师i艐-mi艐(pipo~ujfo~u艐an), twan蕯o~u(pipak-师a艐an), 师o~u艐-jin , ato~u 师o~u艐-师iw a ro~umi省a涩~僧, sa魔蓹to~u o~u ta涩~僧amaanaj a ro~umi省a涩~僧 no~u misatajwanaj, misa艐aj艐ajaj ato~u misa魔o~u删amaj. o~u piwansjawan a ro~umi省a涩~僧 i, itiraaj i saka safaw 删ima a ro~umi省a涩~僧 no~u saka 师蓹师aj a fo~u删a涩~僧 no~u mi魔蓹师a魔蓹师aan(o~u kat蓹删a艐aj a ko~ujo~umi ko~u pin蓹艐n蓹艐an). min蓹艐n蓹艐 to~u masamaamaanaj, makapa魔aj a nisa艐a省an a ma删ikataj a ti艐kiti艐ki i piwansjawan, ato~u mitatamatama to~u mo~untaj a misa删ama .
S.FORM: O kaacangan no Taywan koni Piwansyawan hananay a romi'ad, marecaday to Pisyongacan, Cing-ming(Pipoyfongan), Twan^o(Pipak-cangan), Cong-yin , ato Cong-ciw a romi'ad, saheto o tadamaanay a romi'ad no misaTaywanay, misaNgayngayay ato misaHolamay. O Piwansyawan a romi'ad i, itiraay i saka safaw lima a romi'ad no saka cecay a folad no mihecahecaan(o katelangay a koyomi ko pinengnengan). Minengneng to masamaamaanay, makapahay a nisanga'an a malikatay a tingkitingki i Piwansyawan, ato mitatamatama to montay a misalama .
S.PHON: o~u kaa师a艐an no~u tajwan ko~uni piwansjawan 魔ananaj a ro~umi省a涩~僧, mar蓹师a涩~僧aj to~u pisjo~u艐a师an, 师i艐-mi艐(pipo~ujfo~u艐an), twan蕯o~u(pipak-师a艐an), 师o~u艐-jin , ato~u 师o~u艐-师iw a ro~umi省a涩~僧, sa魔蓹to~u o~u ta涩~僧amaanaj a ro~umi省a涩~僧 no~u misatajwanaj, misa艐aj艐ajaj ato~u misa魔o~u删amaj. o~u piwansjawan a ro~umi省a涩~僧 i, itiraaj i saka safaw 删ima a ro~umi省a涩~僧 no~u saka 师蓹师aj a fo~u删a涩~僧 no~u mi魔蓹师a魔蓹师aan(o~u kat蓹删a艐aj a ko~ujo~umi ko~u pin蓹艐n蓹艐an). min蓹艐n蓹艐 to~u masamaamaanaj, makapa魔aj a nisa艐a省an a ma删ikataj a ti艐kiti艐ki i piwansjawan, ato~u mitatamatama to~u mo~untaj a misa删ama .
